title: Cantillation Marks (Trop): Reading Torah Like a Pro
title_zh: 托拉诵读记号(Trop):像专业人士一样诵读托拉
title_he: טעמי המקרא: קריאת תורה כמו מקצוען
author: Torah Light Project
summary: An in-depth guide to cantillation marks (trop/ta'amei hamikra) - the ancient musical notation system used in Torah reading. Explains their triple function as musical notation, punctuation, and interpretive tradition. Includes practical learning tips, common marks, historical context connecting to Chinese Tang Dynasty, and cultural parallels with traditional Chinese music. Perfect for aspiring Torah readers and those deepening their understanding of Jewish textual tradition.
target_audience: Mandarin speakers learning Hebrew and Torah reading, Bar/Bat Mitzvah students, aspiring Torah readers, Jewish educators
